title: Bits & Cogs
description:
A modpack Created for my own server.
Mainly optimizations and QoL improvements
body:
# Bits & Cogs
The Bits & Cogs modpack is created for use on my personal server. Mainly made to improve optimization and quality of life improvements but also has a few fun mods like re:squake , do a barrel roll and Eat Bottle


The main mod in the pack that changes things up is Create with some add-ons . Just to bring more creative solutions to whatever you might want to farm or build.

 
The pack also comes with some mods that make the multiplayer aspect just a bit more fun like being able to ping objects or blocks , Proximity Voice chat , Loot being per person , more animations and a browser based map that updates in real time using Dynmap (link in Discord)


The pack comes with the Faithfull32x texture pack and should be enabled by default.

A ton of mods to improve the visuals and looks of the world and decoration blocks. so go wild with building.


For any questions regarding mods or the pack itself you can ask me in the Support channel in discord.

I'm open to requests for adding new mods to the pack if the majority agrees to it.

 

The pack will be updated as new versions of mods become available .
